## Checklist (Required)

- [ ] I have searched the existing quotes and confirmed these are **not duplicates**
- [ ] I have verified the **author attribution is correct**
- [ ] Quotes are **properly formatted** (consistent JSON structure, punctuation, etc.)
- [ ] Quotes are **meaningful / motivational** (no low-quality, spammy, or purely neutral content)
- [ ] No typos or grammatical errors
